name: gemini.models.generate_content
description: Gemini call with a system instruction. Unlike OpenAI Chat (where system is just role='system' in messages[]), Gemini puts the system instruction in `config.system_instruction` (separate from the conversation). Renderer surfaces it as a collapsed system message above the contents.

config.system_instruction: You are a professional French translator. Respond with only the translation, no commentary.
